name: Dehaka
description: A Bruiser with a strong, global presence that can effectively clear groups of minions.
title: Primal Pack Leader
info: Cunning and wise, Dehaka is one of the last surviving pack leaders of the forgotten world of Zerus. As with all primal zerg, he is driven by a powerful desire to consume the essence of his foes and evolve into newer and more deadly forms.

Dehaka.name: Drag
Dehaka.description: Dehaka lashes out his tongue, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit, Stunning and dragging them with him for 1.75 seconds.  If Dehaka is Stunned or Silenced while using Drag, the effect ends.

Dehaka.name: Dark Swarm
Dehaka.description: Deal 48 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies for 3.5 seconds. While active, you are able to move through units. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.

Dehaka.name: Burrow
Dehaka.description: Burrow into the ground, entering Stasis and becoming Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While Burrowed, Dehaka can move at 50% movement speed.

Dehaka.name: Isolation
Dehaka.description: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.

Dehaka.name: Adaptation
Dehaka.description: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.

Dehaka.name: Essence Collection
Dehaka.description: Heal Dehaka for 29 (+4% per level) Health per stored Essence over 5 seconds. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.  Passive: Gain 10 Essence from Takedowns and 2 Essence from nearby Minions dying. Maximum of 50 Essence.

Dehaka.name: Brushstalker
Dehaka.description: Activate to burrow to a bush on the Battleground.  Passive: Gain 20% movement speed while in a bush and for 2 seconds after leaving.  Passive: Gathering a Regeneration Globe reduces the cooldown of Brushstalker by 40 seconds.

1.name: Enduring Swarm
1.description: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.

1.name: Tissue Regeneration
1.description: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.

1.name: Enhanced Agility
1.description: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.

4.name: Lurker Strain
4.description: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 2 seconds.

4.name: One-Who-Collects
4.description: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.

4.name: Hero Stalker
4.description: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to 3 at once.

7.name: Feeding Frenzy
7.description: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.  Gambit: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds. Every death reduces this cooldown reduction by 0.25 seconds, up to 3 times.

7.name: Paralyzing Enzymes
7.description: Drag Slows the target by 40% and reduces their healing received by 50% while active and for 2 seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to 2 seconds.

7.name: Symbiosis
7.description: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.

10.name: Isolation
10.description: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.

10.name: Adaptation
10.description: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.

13.name: Ferocious Stalker
13.description: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 50% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.

13.name: Primal Swarm
13.description: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.

13.name: Primal Rage
13.description: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.

16.name: Tunneling Claws
16.description: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 120%.

16.name: Pack Leader
16.description: Dehaka gains 40 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 4 seconds after leaving.

20.name: Contagion
20.description: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals 60% less damage to all targets.

20.name: Change Is Survival
20.description: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.

20.name: Essence Claws
20.description: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.

20.name: Apex Predator
20.description: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 120 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.DehakaAdaptation: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaAdaptationDamageTrackerBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaAdaptationChangeIsSurvivalTalent: Increases Adaptation healing to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DehakaAdaptationChangeIsSurvivalTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaBrushstalker: Activate to burrow to a bush on the Battleground.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,DehakaBrushstalkerShrubMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> movement speed while in a bush and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBrushstalkerShrubMoveSpeedBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds after leaving. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gathering a Regeneration Globe reduces the cooldown of Brushstalker by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d const="$DehakaBrushstalkerRegenGlobeReductionAmount"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaBrushstalkerApexPredatorTalent: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DehakaBrushstalkerApexPredator,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and the cast time by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DehakaBrushstalkerApexPredator,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaBrushstalkerFerociousStalkerTalent: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmFerociousStalkerSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"Precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmFerociousStalkerSlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds and deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,DehakaDarkSwarmDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[FerociousStalker].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaBurrow: Burrow into the ground, entering Stasis and becoming Invulnerable for <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBurrowChannel,Duration"/></c> seconds. While Burrowed, Dehaka can move at <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,DehakaBurrowChannel,Modification.MoveSpeedMaximum/Unit,HeroDehaka,Speed"player="0"/>%</c> movement speed.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaBurrowTalentLurkerStrain: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBurrowTalentLurkerStrainBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DehakaBurrowLurkerStrainTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,DehakaBurrowTalentNumbingEruptionSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="1"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBurrowTalentNumbingEruptionSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,DehakaBurrowTalentLurkerStrain,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaDarkSwarm: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DehakaDarkSwarmDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarm,Period" precision="1"/></c> seconds to nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarm,Duration" player="0"precision="1"/></c> seconds. While active, you are able to move through units. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaDarkSwarmTalentEnduringSwarm: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,DehakaDarkSwarmTalentEnduringSwarm,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds and grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmEnduringSwarm,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor while active.

tooltipMarkup.DehakaIsolationTalentContagion: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(-Effect,DehakaIsolationDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Contagion].Modifier)*100"/>%</c> less damage to all targets.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaPackLeaderBrushstalker: Dehaka gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBrushstalkerPackLeaderArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,DehakaBrushstalkerPackLeaderArmorBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaBrushstalkerPackLeaderArmorBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds after leaving.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaPrimalRage: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,DehakaPrimalRageTalentDamageAccumulator,Scale"Precision="1"/>5%</c> increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.
tooltipMarkup.DehakaPrimalSwarm: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmPrimalSwarmTalentDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus * (-1)"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmPrimalSwarmTalentDebuff,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds, causing them to take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,DehakaDarkSwarmPrimalSwarmTalentDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/>%</c> extra damage.
